formulas.name: Check / Attack
formulas.description: Pathfinder 2e core d20 roll. After importing, replace +0 with your total modifier, such as +7 or -1.

formulas.name: Fortune (roll twice, take higher)
formulas.description: PF2e fortune effects. After importing, replace +0 with your modifier, such as +7 or -1.

formulas.name: Misfortune (roll twice, take lower)
formulas.description: PF2e misfortune effects. After importing, replace +0 with your modifier, such as +7 or -1.

formulas.name: Damage placeholder
formulas.description: After importing, edit the dice and replace +0 with your damage modifier, such as +4 or -1.
